reasoning: SPY at 682.58 is positioned below the prior-session RTH high of 684.92 (Active, 2★), the only 2-star level in play today. Overhead resistance is strong; support below is clustered but weak (all 1★: 682.0, 681.0, 680.0). The Carry-tier 2★ support at 675.79 is $6.79 away—strategic but too distant for morning defense. Ribbon shows mixed stack (pivot 682.97 > fast 682.86 > slow 682.69) with shallow 29¢ spread, yielding no directional edge. The asymmetry is bearish: if 684.92 rejects on test, price flushes through the weak 1★ support cluster toward the Carry level. A hold of 684.92 flips bias bullish to 686+. Battle level is 684.92—today hinges on its test outcome.

primary.condition: if SPY tests and holds 684.92 on first rally

secondary.condition: if SPY fails to hold 684.92 and breaks below 684.0

tertiary.condition: if SPY breaks below 680.0 decisively with volume

key_observations: 684.92 (prior session RTH high) is the only 2★ level within $3.00—absolute battle level for today's morning direction
Support cluster at 682/681/680 is weak (all 1★) and tightly stacked—offers minimal defense if rejected
Ribbon mixed with 29¢ spread provides no structural directional bias; ribbon alignment may break on either a hold or break of 684.92
Carry 2★ support at 675.79 is beyond the $3.00 in-play threshold ($6.79 away) but represents the strategic deep target if morning supports fail
Risk/reward asymmetry favors bearish: strong resistance above, weak supports below
